title: stellaria patens var. patens
intro: Stellaria patens var. patens, also known as starflower or greater starflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Stellaria patens var. patens include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and has been used in herbal medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
